name: belousov-petr
description: Petr Belousov's Claude Code plugins. Currently hosts Strata, which keeps a project's documentation in step with what it actually does.

plugins.name: strata
plugins.description: Keeps a project's documentation in step with what it actually does: decisions, specs, issues, runbooks, and layered memory as plain Markdown under .strata/, brought current on one save command.
